actIIMovementOne: COMPLETE (Ch.1-10, Days 90-99). The associate became the village's EYES; foiled a manufactured war (forged-Cloud frame → caravan ambush → inside broker Administrator Jōzen, a true-believer saboteur). CLIMAX (Day 99, 'Where It Breaks'): a staged 'Cloud' strike on a children's assembly; Iwao shielded the kids, fell to 0/dying (death save 6 FAILED, live) — and the alliance he built (doubled watch + the framed Cloud envoy Raido, who openly took the fake-Cloud attacker ALIVE) caught him; war averted; Jōzen taken unrepentant. STILL AT LARGE: Gomei the Hollow Road (Cloud-defector mastermind) — escaped, revising; the deeper war-design survives for Act II's later climax. Theme proven by dice, not fiat: 'he won by NOT being alone.' Raido = uneasy cross-village ally now.
arcStatus: VOLUME ONE COMPLETE — Academy → graduation → D-ranks → true Dust awakening → Exhibition → Chūnin Exam (paper/survival/finals). Finals: valiant LOSS to Hayato the Lone Blade (failed STR save, dropped to 0, stabilized). Ōnoki withheld promotion — judged, not won; 'never narrated for free' honored. Title remains Genin (resolves the engine rank-by-level divergence in-fiction). The dice owned the climax. Recovery long rest taken (full HP/chakra).

actII.premise: Iwao is a graduated Genin, NOT promoted after the finals, serving as a Genin field-assistant / teaching aide. The world opens up; small missions with large implications; a region quietly tightening toward conflict.
actII.engineReconciliation: Engine restarted to load the buildout (141 actions). Validated LIVE: long rest CLEARED the finals-lingering Prone (conditions fix); passiveStanding:false silenced the off-screen reputation drip; milestone-gated standing; autonomous NPC loop ran with REAL model declarations the DM adjudicates (resolve off = primary path). Clock advanced 6→90 to match the manga; strictTemporal ON (maxUnauthorizedDays 1) so Act II time is lived.
actII.legacyNote: char.rank field still reads 'Chunin' (legacy auto-derive from before the rank-decouple fix); in-world TITLE is Genin. The decouple keeps title/tier separate for all future characters/levels. A character_set_rank migration intent is a future engine follow-up.

newActors.kazan_missiondesk: npc_563a0763 — suppresses how many road reports are going missing; uses the heir as labor (iwagakure)
newActors.dosu_syndicate: npc_8883fd84 — keeps roads moving, hides caravan losses, hires muscle (road_syndicate)
newActors.raido_kumo: npc_5251c1ab — courteous Cloud observer measuring whether the Dust woke earlier than reported (kumogakure)
newActors.gomei_missingnin: npc_2441ef66 — believes a clean war kinder than a rotting peace; SEEDED a border-incident scheme (goal completed on the opening downtime tick); now shadows the eastern caravans after dark (rogues)
newActors.doki_garrison: npc_2486c7f4 — inflates eastern-road danger to win reinforcements (border_garrison)
newActors.kosuke_student: npc_2f79e6f6 — 8yo first-year who worships the heir and molds chakra 'like a fist'; the Act-II thesis student (iwa_academy)

actII.returningGoals: Ōnoki (measure the heir near responsibility w/o isolating him), Kurikara (teach him to carry w/o clenching; persona set), Tetsuna (use him to teach restraint not terror), Ganryū (surpass honestly), Akemi (keep him human).
actII.tensionMap: Eastern caravans coming in thin/late; mission desk (Kazan) suppressing the reports; syndicate (Dosu) hiding losses + hiring muscle; garrison (Doki) clamoring for men; a Cloud envoy (Raido) measuring the bloodline; a missing-nin (Gomei) engineering a border incident. The powder is laid, not yet lit.
actII.openingArcComplete: Days 90-95, Ch.1-6, played day-by-day under STRICT TEMPORAL MODE (every required block lived + resolved before the clock advanced — no time-skips). All dice OOC (inline [OOC ...] brackets + state-ledger), OpenAI TTS narration per chapter, NPC declarations are real model turns the DM adjudicated. Iwao recovered to full each rest.
chaptersDone: Ch.1 The Assistant (D90): teach Kosuke; Chakra Control 11 vs 15 FAIL -> human turn (showed scars, named the finals loss).
Ch.2 The Mission Desk (D91): Raido (Cloud) probes at the gate; Perception 14 vs 14 catches the eastern-road report discrepancy; Kazan deflects.
Ch.3 The Little Escort (D92): Perception 16 vs 15 sees a staged 'accident' as a response-timing probe; Iwao gives the watchers a blank page; Gomei withdraws (needs_dm_repair->narration).
Ch.4 Road Work (D93): Nature 12 vs 15 FAIL (no tracker's eye) but History 23 vs 14 recognizes staged-ambush geometry; Doki seizes it for reinforcements, tainting the alarm.

Ch.5 Caravan Under Rain (D94): COMBAT set-piece (3 bandits + Ren elite +20). Iwao 38->15; held the frame, out-lasted/drove off Ren by control (no kills); Perception 16 found a planted Cloud token = manufactured provocation to frame Kumo for war.

Ch.6 The Report Nobody Wants (D95): trusted Kurikara over the desk; Persuasion 11 vs 15 FAIL (can't sway the room) but Ninshou 24 vs 15 lays the irrefutable case; Onoki's 'measure' goal completed -> grants Iwao standing + a charge to FIND the framer.
huntArc: Ch.7 The Hand Behind the Token (D96): Ninshou 14 vs 16 FAIL (can't trace the forgery by book); trusts ENEMY Raido (wary alliance) who gives the lead the archive couldn't — the token was forged by someone who knows the Cloud from the INSIDE (a Cloud-connected rogue).

Ch.8 The Rot Inside (D97): Perception 19 (w/ Akemi sensing) traces money+muscle BACKWARD — runs IN through the wall. Dosu (used, not complicit) gives up an inside BROKER wearing a 'chain of office.' Gomei's second shape: an incident from within the Stone. Onoki sets an unchained watch.
actII.liveTension: FRAMER = Gomei the Hollow Road (npc_2441ef66), a Cloud DEFECTOR with an old grudge against both villages, using two as blade+throat. He has an INSIDE BROKER (a trusted Iwa functionary 'wearing a chain of office') and is building a 'second shape' — an incident from inside the Stone that needs no token to be believed. ALLY: Raido of the Cloud (npc_5251c1ab), framed too, in a wary partnership with Iwao. Iwao holds Onoki's charge (find the hand, eyes before blood) + the planted token. NEXT: identify/confront the broker before the inside-incident fires. Escalation Layer 3, building toward a mid-Act-II climax.
actII.iwaoArcTruth: Across the hunt the dice keep drawing the same soul: he FAILS the people/instinct/forgery rolls (Persuasion, Nature, the forgery analysis) and WINS the knowledge/pattern rolls (History, Ninshou-case, Perception-with-Akemi) — and his real growth is learning to bring his FRIENDS/allies to cover his weaknesses (the cell, the sensor, even an enemy). Frame, not fist; trust, not control — now applied to alliance and to suspecting home.
actII.craftRules: PROSE keeps dice OOC (Engine Log footer + callouts), never in narrative. COMBAT narrated as UFC-style play-by-play with exact rolls/damage/HP/proximity-to-death in the OOC log.

squad.sensei: Kurikara (npc_a42aa521) — scarred war-vet, zero awe, demands he prove he's more than a bloodline and a liability
squad.graduated: Day 28 — headband earned, top practical marks

arcFlags.dustReframe: Day 3 — control comes free, Dust must be EARNED; failed forbidden solo reach unmade a patch of wall; Ryūen forbade unsupervised attempts for years.
arcFlags.particleFrame: Day 4 — Iwao learns Dust = simultaneity (three natures balanced at once), not sequence; the intellectual path, takes years.
arcFlags.trustWound: Day 5 — failed the tactics drill by treating teammates as variables; Akemi names it: he holds everyone at arm's length because he fears his own hands. Teamwork is his real growth edge before graduation/squad.
arcFlags.deferredAwakening: Day 23 — first sanctioned Dust attempt before Ōnoki FUMBLED (nat-1); the bloodline refused him; Ōnoki caught the backlash and gave the true key: hold the natures like a FRAME, not a fist — trust, not control (the same lesson as the cell). Dust ladder still NOT learned; the real awakening waits until he integrates 'trust the natures'. Convergence point: bloodline-mastery == the trust/teamwork arc.

relationships.family: Tsuru/Gennai/Mai bonds warming (dinner Day 1, defining beats)
relationships.akemi: closest friend; named his blind spot (Day 5): he won't trust teammates because he fears his own hands. The story's emotional anchor.
relationships.ganryu: rivalry seeded, disposition -1 ('the wind cut that leaf, not you')
relationships.romaru: wary respect after Day-2 spar (+1, 'you're not soft')
relationships.ryuen: mentor bond deepening (caught the Day-3 forbidden Dust reach; protective, fear-driven)

structure: A SHINOBI LIFE-SIM told as narrative manga. ONE CHAPTER PER DAY (chapters/dayNNN.md), authored BY HAND, PURE NARRATIVE (no inline mechanics — engine truth lives HERE in ledger.json). Each day is narrated HOUR BY HOUR with AT LEAST 10 beats (## time-stamped scene headers walking the daily schedule: wake/molding, breakfast/family, commute, the class periods, breaks, lunch, sensei training/sparring, downtime, dinner, evening, sleep). Played moment-to-moment (single engine calls; BATCH only for combat setup/utility, never to time-skip). Mechanically-significant beats are engine-grounded (checks/casts/spars/rests/level-ups); the rest is life-sim texture (relationships, habits, the small accumulations). AFTER EACH DAY: update docs/index.html + commit + push so the live Pages site follows in real time. Mandate: run continuously ~100 days / through the arc before reporting back.

sheet.inWorldTitle: Genin (RESOLVED: Ōnoki withheld promotion at the finals — title stays Genin, cleanly matching the adjudicated result; the engine rank auto-set 'Chunin' is treated as jutsu-tier only. bug_1780247960181 closed in-fiction.)

progression: XP system added to engine (commit 69ceb9f): award_xp earns XP scaled small->large for engine-grounded beats; auto-levels at thresholds. L1->L2 on Day 8 (first week, 200 XP) lifted HP 8->14, Chakra 14->23 — easing the glass-cannon. Note: jutsuKnownCap still 3 at L2 (Ninjutsu Specialist gains jutsu slots at later levels); to learn the Dust ladder he'll free a slot (jutsu_forget) or hit a cap-growth level.

renown.note: FAME — passive, drawn by the bloodline whether earned or not (engine 'reputation'); the unearned hype. NOT the point.

willOfStone.what: Iwagakure's Will of Fire: carry weight without breaking; never crush the people you carry it beside. DM-AWARDED only, for defining moments, scaled small(1)/medium(2-3)/large(4-5). Engine track: iwagakure FAVOR (cap 10). THIS is what Iwao earns.

awarded.moment: Ended the spar without crushing Rōmaru even at 2 HP — carried the heavier stone, didn't crush the one beside him.
Said 'help'; learned blind trust (3 then 5 steps); climbed to the quarry to seek the cost of his gift.
Mid-term eval: his plan FAILED under pressure, but he'd left gaps and trusted his cell — Akemi & Tobari covered the breach and they passed together. Succeeded by the creed, not by control.
Failed the awakening utterly before the Third Tsuchikage (nat-1) and did not break — stood in the wreck and asked to be taught.
The true Dust awakening: wielded the deadliest bloodline in history to SHIELD a fallen Ganryū, not to crush — held the frame, not the fist. The Hidden Stone's creed fully embodied.

engineNotesOpen: Prone condition lingers after end_combat AND through a long rest (cosmetic; HP/chakra recover correctly). Minor — long rest should clear knocked-prone status. Logged for a future pass; not fixed this run to avoid end-of-arc scope creep.
xpAdded: engine XP/leveling integrated (commit 69ceb9f): progression.ts (xpThreshold/levelForXp/xpToNext), character.xp field, award_xp intent w/ auto-level, summary() exposes xp+xpToNext. Per user mandate 'dont forget to integrate xp awards and leveling. add it to the engine if you must.'
policy: Kit all combat NPCs/adversaries with real jutsu loadouts at spawn; freeform only for improv (natural molding / technique synthesis). Missions begin a few in-story weeks in.
notes: Clean restart per steer. Another agent shares this repo/engine (durable NPC-agent layer, commit 7f3d9d1); reach new engine intents via submit_intent (this session's MCP controller schema is cached).
